findings.description: Signature image containing text duplicated alongside HTML text rendition of the same content. The signature block image includes 'Sincerely,' 'Judith A. Wehner,' and 'Assistant State Mining Spe[cialist]' alongside separate HTML text of the same name and title, creating reading-order duplication.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows a single signature block with handwritten signature, printed name and title. HTML renders both a cropped image of the signature block (containing the printed name/title text) AND separate HTML text for 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' below the image.

findings.description: Partial text fragment from the letter body appears at the bottom of the HTML after the cc line and DEQ logo, disrupting reading flow. A red/bold block reading 'Please be advised that ou... above have been fully addresse... information, not included in this l' duplicates body content in the wrong location.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 ends cleanly with Enclosures and cc line. HTML rendering shows a partial, styled text fragment from the letter body appearing below the cc line and DEQ logo, creating a duplicate out-of-order content block.
